title: Quality cork guide
author: Rodriguez García, Aida
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The project aimed to improve cork harvesting efficiency and explore new uses of cork beyond wine corking, such as in the aeronautical industry and cosmetics. Results include a guide to new cork applications, highlighting economic potential for rural areas and ecosystem preservation.
steps_raw: The project aimed to improve cork harvesting efficiency and explore new uses of cork beyond wine corking, such as in the aeronautical industry and cosmetics. Results include a guide to new cork applications, highlighting economic potential for rural areas and ecosystem preservation.
